name: executing-jupiter
description: Jupiter API execution skill for agents - fetch, sign, and execute Solana transactions

scripts.check: pnpm build && node dist/scripts/fetch-api.js --help >/dev/null && node dist/scripts/wallet-sign.js --help >/dev/null && node dist/scripts/send-transaction.js --help >/dev/null && node dist/scripts/execute-order.js --family ultra --help >/dev/null && node dist/scripts/execute-order.js --family trigger --help >/dev/null && node dist/scripts/execute-order.js --family recurring --help >/dev/null
